clips.title: The Path
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, lush grade. A sun-dappled forest trail, tall trees, ferns, shafts of light through the canopy. Morning, warm. A person in a hiking outfit walks along the path below. The camera starts on the sunlit treetops and tilts down, descending the frame to reveal them on the trail. Warm dappled light, green depth, 35mm, tilt down. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: Arrival
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, elegant grade. The grand facade of a luxury hotel, columns, a glowing marquee, a red carpet entrance. Evening, warm lights. A person in formal evening wear stands at the entrance below. The camera starts high on the facade and tilts down, descending to reveal them at the doors. Warm marquee light, rich tones, 35mm, tilt down. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Shore
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, majestic grade. Towering snow-capped mountain peaks above a mirror-still alpine lake, pines along the shore. Dawn, cool and warm mix. A person in a warm coat stands at the lakeshore below. The camera starts on the peaks and tilts down, descending to reveal them at the water's edge. Cool peaks with warm dawn, 35mm, tilt down. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: Spotlight
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, theatrical grade. A concert stage rig high above, hanging lights and trusses glowing, haze in the beams. Night. A person in stage attire stands alone in a pool of light on the stage below. The camera starts on the light rig and tilts down through the beams to reveal them on stage. Hot beams, volumetric haze, deep dark, 35mm, tilt down. Shallow depth of field, grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Ballroom
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, opulent grade. A grand ballroom, an enormous crystal chandelier glittering above, gilded ceiling. Evening, warm sparkle. A person in formal attire stands alone on the polished floor below. The camera starts on the chandelier and tilts down, descending to reveal them in the ballroom. Warm sparkling light, rich gold, 35mm, tilt down. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: Daydream
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, dreamy grade. A bright blue sky with soft drifting clouds above a green summer meadow. Afternoon, warm. A person in casual summer clothes lies in the grass below, arms behind their head. The camera starts on the sky and clouds and tilts down, descending to reveal them lying in the meadow. Soft warm daylight, gentle bokeh, 35mm, tilt down. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.
